channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-17
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The `giladfeldman/docpluck` project has added several new features, including optional extraction guardrails and fallback telemetry counters, while also refining its documentation and continuous integration checks. Meanwhile, the `Davidvandijcke/coarse` project has enhanced its code analysis capabilities with the addition of a CodeQL analysis workflow configuration. The `JamieCummins/regcheck` project has made notable updates, including the addition of HTML and OSF support, a new light mode, and bug fixes. Additionally, the `giladfeldman/escicheck` and `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` projects have seen updates, with the former syncing with `escicheckapp` to incorporate new effectcheck versions and the latter revising its validation note and adding a citation. These connections and advancements demonstrate the collaborative spirit and dedication to improvement within our community.

88 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

New releases: metacheck v0.1.0-beta

Most active:

metacheck33 commits
docpluck26 commits
regcheck25 commits
coarse3 commits
auto-zcurve1 commits

item.title: regcheck: 5 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the primary focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The work added HTML and OSF support, as stated in the commit message "add html, osf support". The privacy.html file was updated, as per the commit "Update privacy.html", which modified its content. Additionally, the frontend was updated to include a light mode, and bugs related to scroll and gpt-oss were fixed, as mentioned in the commits "frontend updates - light mode!" and "fix scroll and gpt-oss bugs". The functionality of Claude was also added, and prior to these changes, the pdf report handling and file viewer were updated, as noted in the commits "update pdf report handling" and "update file viewer".

5 commit(s) today:

  • 8cddeb8 [staging] add html, osf support — Jamie Cummins
  • 978ec81 [staging] Update privacy.html — Jamie Cummins
  • 50f52d9 [staging] frontend updates - light mode! — Jamie Cummins
  • b4dc8e4 [staging] fix scroll and gpt-oss bugs — Jamie Cummins
  • 9a99761 [staging] add claude functionality — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
